calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.
Off Calendar Jul-13-2026 Off Calendar
TENTATIVE RULING: OFF CALENDAR
EXAMINER: EDWARD MIYAUCHI

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-09-2026 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-09-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Feb-24-2016 is admitted to probate. Jonathan Hsieh is appointed Administrator with Will annexed, with limited authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status hearing on filing of petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for Jul-13-2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
